task_objective: Implement /tmp/sdh_ludusavi_srp_polish_implementation_plan.md to clean facade match_game rebinding, update first-party contention tests, update gateway logging to be callback-based, and verify architecture tests.

Updated contention tests to patch the registry method registry.match_game directly, keeping boundaries clean.
Changed current_config_mtime_ns inside gateway.py to invoke the _log callback instead of facade.log directly.
Cleaned dynamic module lookup comments from log_buffer.py.
results: All 361 tests passed successfully. Ruff lint/format check passed, ty type check passed, and git diff has no whitespace errors.
